evidence.detail: Multiple posts show likes as -1 (hidden), including posts with 5 comments, 2 comments, and 1 comment each. Cannot validate engagement authenticity when likes are concealed

Bot detector shows engagement score of 0.5004 (above 0.5 threshold) and calculated engagement rate of 0.87% which is within nano influencer range (3-5%) but the anomaly score indicates irregular patterns
Following 2,576 accounts while having 5,600 followers. Ratio of 2.17 is concerning for an influencer - following too many accounts relative to influence level
Instagram shows 5,600 followers with engagement issues, TikTok shows much higher engagement rates (95-305 likes on 644-7,438 views) suggesting audience may not transfer between platforms
1,376 posts over account lifetime with travel/luxury focus is consistent. Recent posts show authentic travel content with proper location tagging and hotel partnerships
fakeInfluencerScore of 0.0 indicates genuine account, humanScore of 0.91 confirms real person operation, but engagementScore above 0.5 flags irregular engagement patterns
